subcodes.first_line: This Book speaketh with truth, and God hath made it a sign of His Revelation and the sovereign authority of His Cause between the heavens and the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و جعله الله آیه ظهوره و سلطان امره بین السموات و الارض و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
